pageContext.name: Gogeta Super Saiyan 4 (Saiyan Warrior with Ultimate Power)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Tamashii Nations are excited to present the Gogeta Super Saiyan 4 (Saiyan Warrior with Ultimate Power) Statue!  A new collaboration between FiguartsZERO and Dokkan Battle, commemorating the seventh anniversary of the popular mobile game! Super Saiyan 4 Gogeta joins the FiguartsZERO Chogekisen series with dynamic effect parts that faithfully capture his illustrated appearance.  Don't miss your chance to add this finely sculpted statue to your Dragon Ball GT collection today!
